ddls:
CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "parent_division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent division (for hierarchical divisions) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_parent_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES expense_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_details" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the expense belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense category */,
  "jan" REAL /* Expense amount for January */,
  "feb" REAL /* Expense amount for February */,
  "mar" REAL /* Expense amount for March */,
  "total_expense" REAL /* Total expense amount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_details_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_details_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expense_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the budget belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense category */,
  "allocated_amount" REAL /* Allocated budget amount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the budget period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the budget period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expense_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial manager, accountant, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the expense data */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the expense data belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense category */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the expense data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expense_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the alert belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense category */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Alert message */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expense_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the expense belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense category */,
  "jan" REAL /* Expense amount for January */,
  "feb" REAL /* Expense amount for February */,
  "mar" REAL /* Expense amount for March */,
  "total_expense" REAL /* Total expense amount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_history_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_history_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expense_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_history_expense_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_id") REFERENCES expense_details ("expense_id")
)
